event.title: BInnovative With Women In Tech
event.zoomInfo: Single Zoom link for the full day — join any session remotely from other offices.
event.audience: IT, InfoSec, and CCO teams. Open to all offices via Zoom.
event.cost: Free — fully sponsored by Women in Technology.
event.lunchInfo: Provided at no cost — all expenses covered by WIT.

agenda.title: Registration, Networking & Coffee
agenda.description: Check in, grab coffee, and connect with peers before the day kicks off.

agenda.title: Keynote: GenAI Development, Enterprise AI Platforms & Data
agenda.speaker: Head of GenAI Development, Enterprise AI Platforms & Enablement, and Head of Data
agenda.description: How GenAI development, enterprise AI platform enablement, and data strategy come together to drive innovation and business value.

agenda.title: Keynote: Technology Vision
agenda.speaker: CTO
agenda.description: The CTO's perspective on where technology is headed — strategic priorities, architectural direction, and the role of AI in our enterprise future.

agenda.title: Keynote: Security in the Age of AI
agenda.speaker: Head of Security
agenda.description: Securing AI systems, protecting data, and building trust in an era of rapid automation. What security leaders need to know.

agenda.title: Panel: Balancing Governance & Innovation
agenda.speaker: GenAI Review Group  |  Moderator: [TBD]
agenda.description: How do we move fast with AI while staying responsible? A candid discussion on balancing governance guardrails with the pace of innovation.

agenda.title: Break & Transition to Tracks
agenda.description: Move to your chosen track room.

agenda.title: Parallel Tracks (see below)
agenda.description: Three simultaneous tracks: Vendor Demos, Business Demos, and Technology. Choose the track most relevant to you.

agenda.title: Lunch & Vendor Networking Hour
agenda.description: Lunch is served — all expenses covered by WIT. Vendors remain available for one-on-one conversations, architecture questions, and deeper dives.

tracks.description: Choose one track to attend. All run simultaneously for 1.5 hours.

items.name: Track 1: Vendor Demos
items.description: Live product roadmaps and demos from our technology partners. See what's coming and how to build with it.

sessions.title: OpenAI
sessions.description: Latest models, APIs, and enterprise capabilities

sessions.title: AWS
sessions.description: Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker, and AI/ML stack

sessions.title: WSO2
sessions.description: Integration-first AI strategy and API management

sessions.title: OnTrust
sessions.description: Trust, privacy, and AI risk management platform

items.name: Track 2: Business Demos
items.description: How AI and data are transforming our core business lines. Real use cases from across the firm.

sessions.title: Client Advisory (CA)
sessions.description: AI-enhanced client insights and advisory workflows

sessions.title: Investments
sessions.description: Data-driven investment analysis and portfolio intelligence

sessions.title: Operations
sessions.description: Operational efficiency through AI and intelligent automation

items.name: Track 3: Technology
items.description: Deep technical sessions on building, deploying, and securing AI/data systems at enterprise scale.

sessions.title: Data Platform & Engineering
sessions.description: Modern data infrastructure for AI workloads

sessions.title: Security & Compliance
sessions.description: Securing AI pipelines and meeting regulatory requirements

speakers.name: Head of GenAI Development, Enterprise AI Platforms & Data
speakers.description: Leading GenAI development, enterprise AI platform enablement, and data strategy — driving innovation and business value across the firm.

speakers.name: CTO
speakers.description: Setting the strategic technology direction — architectural priorities, AI integration, and the enterprise future.

speakers.name: Head of Security
speakers.role: Keynote: Security in the Age of AI
speakers.description: Securing AI systems, protecting data, and building trust in an era of rapid automation.

speakers.name: Manisha
speakers.description: Leading Women in Technology at Bessemer. Hosting BInnovative, announcing Reverse Mentorship and Passing the Torch to 2027 leadership.

speakers.name: Eva
speakers.description: Taking the helm of Women in Technology for 2027 and beyond.

speakers.name: Dave
speakers.description: Partnering with Eva to shape WIT's future direction.

vendors.name: OpenAI
vendors.description: Explore the latest models, APIs, and enterprise capabilities from the team behind GPT and beyond.

vendors.name: AWS
vendors.description: Deep dive into Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker, and the full AI/ML stack for enterprise builders.

vendors.name: WSO2
vendors.description: API-first architecture, integration platforms, and composable enterprise strategy for the AI era.

vendors.name: Charles River
vendors.description: AI-driven investment management, order management systems, and portfolio analytics.

vendors.name: OnTrust
vendors.description: Trust intelligence, privacy management, and AI risk governance platform.

mentorship.headline: Reverse Mentorship Program — AI & Data
mentorship.subtitle: Bridging generations of expertise in AI, data strategy, and emerging technology.
mentorship.body: The WIT Reverse Mentorship program pairs emerging professionals with senior leaders to exchange knowledge on AI, data engineering, machine learning, and data-driven decision-making. Mentors share deep domain expertise and organizational context; mentees bring fresh perspectives on the latest AI tools, data platforms, and modern development practices. Together, both sides grow — accelerating AI adoption while grounding it in real business experience.
mentorship.ctaBody: Whether you want to mentor or be mentored, we want to hear from you. Mentor and mentee selections will be announced at the event. Applications are now open for both roles.

about.title: Keynotes
about.description: Hear from leaders on AI, data strategy, and security — setting the vision for innovation.

about.title: 3 Parallel Tracks
about.description: Vendor demos, business use cases, and deep technology sessions — choose your path.

about.title: Governance Panel
about.description: Balancing GenAI innovation with responsible guardrails and enterprise governance.

about.title: Vendor Networking
about.description: One hour dedicated to conversations with OpenAI, AWS, WSO2, Charles River, and OnTrust.
